title: Taiwan MND Detects 7 PLAN Vessels, No PLA Aircraft
detail: Taiwan's Ministry of National Defense detected 7 Chinese naval vessels and 3 official ships operating around Taiwan's territorial waters on March 23. Notably, no PLA aircraft were detected operating in Taiwan's ADIZ — a continuation of the reduced aerial activity observed since March 11. ROC Armed Forces monitored the situation; no flight path illustration was provided.
